_doc: Merchant/CDN image hosts allowed through next/image [FR-2.2 tripwire class]. next.config.mjs builds remotePatterns from this list; SmartImage falls back to a plain for any host NOT listed, so an unlisted host degrades optimization instead of crashing the PDP. The coverage watchdog alerts when deal rows carry a host missing here. Every '**.' wildcarded network also gets an exact apex entry: Next's own wildcard matcher requires a subdomain segment and does NOT match the bare apex (isAllowedImageHost/hostAllowed do treat the apex as covered, so without this a bare-apex URL would clear our gate and then hit next/image's 'hostname not configured' throw).
